---
title: "About me"
---

I am currently studying MSc Housing and City Planning at University College London. I hold a 2:1 in BSc Urban Planning and Development (Sandwich Year) from Cardiff University.

My experience spans local authority planning, development management, heritage and householders, planning enforcement, community mediation and property market research. I am motivated to pursue chartered RTPI membership and to keep building practical planning judgement across housing, retrofit, policy and the historic built environment.

View my [CV](cv.qmd) and [Coursework](coursework.qmd) →

## Technical Proficiency

**Planning and research**: policy interpretation, delegated planning decisions, consultation, appeal tracking, feasibility research, qualitative and quantitative research

**Tools**: Microsoft Office, SketchUp, DigiMaps, Uniform and IDOX case management software

[View my GitHub →](https://github.com/Jaojaobot)

## Languages

-   English
-   Mandarin Chinese

## Interests and Hobbies

-   Parkrun, marathon fundraising, planning, housing and the historic built environment
